_meta.note: This is the reference config. MiroFish auto-generates its own simulation_config.json via LLM from the seed document. Use this to cross-validate or override.

platform_a.name: StockTalk Nepal
platform_a.description: Short-form posts, trending topics, rapid sentiment spread. Mimics Nepal's Twitter/X and Facebook financial communities.

platform_b.name: r/NepseInvestors
platform_b.description: Threaded discussions, deep analysis, community voting. Mimics Nepali investment forums and Sharesansar discussion boards.

morning_session.rationale: Retail and diaspora investors most active at market open, checking overnight news

midday_session.rationale: Institutional brokers execute large orders mid-session; hydro analysts post technical commentary

afternoon_session.rationale: Policy watchers respond to NRB and government announcements; political analysts post EOD commentary

breaking_news.rationale: Retail momentum agents react immediately to any breaking news at all hours

late_evening.rationale: Diaspora investors in different timezones (Gulf +2:45, Malaysia +2:15 from NST) active in Nepal evening

seed_topics: NRB repo rate and monetary policy outlook
NEPSE index trend and technical levels
Political stability and coalition government news
USD/NPR exchange rate and remittance flows
